title: rubus × trichothecus
intro: Rubus × trichothecus, also known as Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rubus genus and is commonly found in the Himalayan regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × trichothecus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region.
